differential_diagnoses: Restrictive cardiomyopathy due to another storage disease (e.g., Fabry disease)
next_steps: Serum and urine protein electrophoresis with immunofixation
Cardiac MRI (repeat or review for specific amyloid patterns like diffuse subendocardial LGE and abnormal myocardial nulling)
Endomyocardial biopsy if non-invasive workup is inconclusive
Echocardiogram with strain imaging (global longitudinal strain pattern assessment)
